emergencyContact.name: Donna Whitlock-Reyes
emergencyContact.relationship: Sister (lives ~15 min away; drives patient to appointments)

primaryCareProvider.name: Dr. Karen Estrada, MD
primaryCareProvider.notes: Rural PCP. Coordinates with the academic hepatology team ~90 minutes away (University hepatology). Sees patient for general care; defers liver management to hepatology.

insurance.name: Maryland Medicaid (HealthChoice) + Medicare (disability)
insurance.notes: Dual-eligible. Transportation to the academic center is a recurring barrier (rural, 90 min each way; relies on her sister).
